content:
I’m not sure if this is a bug or intended, but if it’s intended I believe it doesn’t really go with the spirit of the paradox covenant set and should be changed.

The way the paradox set is supposed to work is that it is supposed to increase the cost of your first exalt without increasing the cost of subsequent exalts. The way this is implemented is by increasing the aliemus cap for exalts to 120, but keeping the amount of aliemus depleted when using exalt at 100, so after you exalt you are supposed to have 20 aliemus still and therefore after the first exalt you’ll always have at most 100 aliemus left to go.

Seems fine, but increasing the cap by 20 also increases the cap by 40 for overexalt, and the cap is now 240. So the consumption for overexalt should also be kept at 200, right, so it still only increases the cost of the first overexalt in practice?

Well, I think that’s how it should work, but right now it doesn’t. Right now paradox set just increases your overexalt cost as well, not just the cap, which means in practice you can’t really overexalt at all on awakeners using the paradox covenant set. See this video: https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1324466524383350874/1409469474750464072/ScreenRecording_08-25-2025_02-26-30_1.mov?ex=68ad7e3d&is=68ac2cbd&hm=6ae90ba632b3eb510e6d96d61660a92a6e6dc7f250a102ee242d9d658876256d&

If this a bug, it would make OE Kathy feel a bit better if it was fixed, and if it’s an intended feature I believe it should be changed.

Thanks!

Hello, i was thinking that maybe you guys can make some joke skins, in april fool style or others.

For example Lotan is a whale instead of a herself, and when she exalt it's her human body that is used instead of a whale.

看同調率一直溢出覺得有些可惜(喚醒體大過勞

What I mean is when you read the card and it generates another card you can see said card in the description but if that other card creates more cards or keywords you can't see them- Sounds rediculous but it is quite the problem on characters like Hameln or Myriam who generate a lot of consecutive stuff. For example Hameln generates "Symphony of Harmony" that generates "Ascending Scale" or "Descending scale" and there is no way that I know of to read what they do without actually going into a game and using the card which is quite an ordeal to just read what cards do. Doesn't need to be a hard fix either, you can just add the generated cards as extra descriptions on the same screen
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Suggestion: See cards in descriptions of cards
